diff.before: No delay in filing the complaint. The accused resides within the jurisdiction of this court, hence enquiry u/s.225 of BNSS is dispensed with. Heard. Perused the records. Satisfied that there is sufficient ground to proceed against the accused for the offence punishable u/s.138 of NI Act. Hence the court took cognizance of the aforesaid offence and the case is taken on file as ST. Issue summons. Take steps.22.06.2026.
